summary: The ProductOS suite now distributes the refreshed market-intelligence slice through a leadership-ready digest without weakening refresh or governance controls.

workspace_summaries.headline: The self-hosting workspace now turns governed market-intelligence output into a leadership-ready digest with explicit proof boundaries.

portfolio_risks: External publishing adapters remain the next packaging risk after the leadership-digest path.
Broader cross-functional distribution should keep the same evidence and contradiction controls.
